title: picea vulgaris var. alpestris
intro: Picea vulgaris var. alpestris, also known as Siberian spruce or alpine spruce, is a coniferous evergreen tree species native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its high content of terpenes and flavonoids. The health benefits of Picea vulgaris var. alpestris include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of essential oils, infusions, or decoctions, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including coughs and colds.
